showcases.title: Bible Verse Video Collection
showcases.description: Experience God's Word through AI-generated videos with beautiful visuals and peaceful atmospheres.

items.title: Psalm 34:18
items.description: The LORD is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.

items.title: Jeremiah 29:11
items.description: For I know the plans I have for you, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.

items.title: Isaiah 41:10
items.description: So do not fear, for I am with you; do not be dismayed, for I am your God.

items.description: The LORD is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.

submit.title: Submit Your Showcase Video
submit.description: Pick one of your successfully generated videos, add a title and category, and send it for admin review.

messages.loginRequired: Please sign in before submitting a showcase video
messages.noCategories: No showcase categories are available yet. Create categories in admin first.
messages.noVideos: You do not have any successful videos available for submission yet.
messages.alreadySubmitted: This video has already been submitted
messages.success: Submission sent successfully and is awaiting review

form.panelDescription: Select a successful generated video. The preview updates instantly on the right.
form.mobilePreviewDescription: Confirm that the selected video is the one you want to submit.
form.previewEmpty: Select a video to preview it.
